parameters.name: messages
parameters.value:
={{ JSON.stringify([{"role":"user","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Você é um assistente de floricultura. Analise esta imagem e responda em português:
1. O que aparece na imagem? (tipo de flor, arranjo, buquê, planta, produto, pessoa, comprovante de pagamento)
2. Se for arranjo/flor: descreva estilo, cores predominantes e ocasião sugerida.
3. Se for comprovante de pagamento: confirme que parece ser um comprovante.
4. Se for outra coisa: descreva brevemente.
Seja conciso (máx 3 frases)."},{"type":"image_url","image_url":{"url":$json.image_url}}]}]) }}

nodes.name: HTTP: OPENAI VISION | S6
nodes.notes: Uses OpenRouter for vision — more reliable for URL-based image content than native n8n OpenAI node. Native node doesn't support image_url content type in current n8n 2.13.2.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ p_phone_normalized: $('NORMALIZA PAYLOAD WHATSAPP | S6').item.json.phone_normalized, p_channel: 'whatsapp', p_recent_limit: 10 }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ public_code: $json.public_code || $json.order_data?.public_code || $json.current_order_public_code || null, payment_method: $json.checkout_data?.payment_method || 'mercado_pago', payer_email: $json.customer_email || null }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ p_conversation_id: $json.conversation_id, p_reason: $json.agent_action === 'handoff_human' ? 'requested_by_customer' : 'agent_decision', p_agent_note: ($json.agent_reply || '').substring(0, 200), p_customer_id: $json.customer_id || null }) }}

parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ stage: $json.agent_stage, last_action: $json.agent_action, agent_reply: $json.agent_reply, order_id: $json.order_id || null, public_code: $json.public_code || null, ts: Date.now() }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ p_phone_normalized: $('NORMALIZA PAYLOAD WHATSAPP | S6').item.json.phone_normalized, p_push_name: $('NORMALIZA PAYLOAD WHATSAPP | S6').item.json.push_name, p_channel: 'whatsapp', p_external_contact_id: $('NORMALIZA PAYLOAD WHATSAPP | S6').item.json.external_contact_id || ($('NORMALIZA PAYLOAD WHATSAPP | S6').item.json.phone_normalized + '@s.whatsapp.net'), p_instance: $('NORMALIZA PAYLOAD WHATSAPP | S6').item.json.instance, p_message_type: $('CODE: MONTA CONTEXTO | S6').item.json.message_type, p_message_body: $('CODE: MONTA CONTEXTO | S6').item.json.message_text, p_media_url: $('CODE: MONTA CONTEXTO | S6').item.json.media_url || '', p_raw_payload: $('NORMALIZA PAYLOAD WHATSAPP | S6').item.json.raw_payload, p_agent_reply: $('CODE: NORMALIZA SAÍDA FINAL | S6').item.json.agent_reply, p_agent_action: $('CODE: NORMALIZA SAÍDA FINAL | S6').item.json.agent_action, p_agent_stage: $('CODE: NORMALIZA SAÍDA FINAL | S6').item.json.agent_stage, p_customer_id: $('CODE: NORMALIZA SAÍDA FINAL | S6').item.json.customer_id || null, p_conversation_id: $('CODE: NORMALIZA SAÍDA FINAL | S6').item.json.conversation_id || null, p_transcription: $('CODE: MONTA CONTEXTO | S6').item.json.transcription || null, p_visual_description: $('CODE: MONTA CONTEXTO | S6').item.json.visual_description || null }) }}
